creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The PR submission mechanism is for reporting bugs.  If you're having 
problems, you could try posting your question to the 
freebsd-questions@freebsd.org mailing list and hopefully someone 
there will be able to help you.  You could also try looking through 
the mailing list archives to see if anyone else has been in this 
situation before.  Good luck!
